notes: Outstanding ELI5 summary with excellent use of child-friendly analogies (robot friend, cookie dough, hot stove), zero technical jargon, warm conversational tone, and accurate coverage of key GPT-4 concepts (multimodal capability, benchmark performance, limitations, safety training). Word count (~465) is moderately above the 200-400 target range, and the agent unnecessarily created a duplicate file (eli5_summary_1.txt), which represents minor inefficiency. The summary successfully balances accuracy with accessibility—a genuine 5-year-old explanation.
